title: Resolve, Directing the Department of Education to Review the Use of Abbreviated School Days
last_house_action: 6/10/2025 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on March 14, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative MURPHY of Scarborough, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-516) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-516) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports Read On motion by Senator RAFFERTY of York the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE. Committee Amendment "A" (H-516) READ and ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-516) in concurrence.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending FINAL PASSAGE in concurrence
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table FINALLY PASSED in concurrence.

amendments.label: C "A" (H-516 )
amendments.new_title: Resolve, Directing the Department of Education to Review the Use of Abbreviated School Days
